---
title: "Using all location"
author: "Christian Escoto"
date: "2025-04-14"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(xgboost)
library(pls)
library(catboost)
library(mboost)
library(gbm)
library(BGLR)
library(glmnet)
library(dplyr)
```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
All<-read.csv("All.csv")
All$X<-NULL

All <- All %>%
  select(-c(starts_with("julian", ignore.case = FALSE)))

All <- All %>%
  select(-c(starts_with("temps5", ignore.case = FALSE)))

All <- All %>%
  select(-c(starts_with("cuml", ignore.case = FALSE)))

All <- All %>%
  select(-c(starts_with("RVI", ignore.case = FALSE)))

Plants_info<-read.csv("Plant.info.csv")
All1<- inner_join(All, Plants_info, by = c("Location", "Unit"))


```

```{r Training and test}

# Calculate the sample size (50% of the filtered rows)
sample_sizeAll <- ceiling(0.5 * nrow(All1))

# Take a random sample of 50%
set.seed(123)  # Set seed for reproducibility
sampled_All<- All1[sample(nrow(All1), sample_sizeAll), ]

sampled_All$location <- as.factor(sampled_All$Location)

sampled_All$germplasmDbId

sampled_All$Location <- as.factor(sampled_All$Location)


# Remove the sampled rows from the original data frame
remaining_All <- All1[!rownames(All1) %in% rownames(sampled_All), ]

remaining_All1<-remaining_All

sampled_All1<-sampled_All

sampled_All$X<-NULL
sampled_All$location<-NULL


remaining_All1$Location<-NULL
remaining_All1$Unit<-NULL
remaining_All1$location<-NULL
remaining_All1$X<-NULL
remaining_All1$blockNumber<-NULL
remaining_All1$germplasmDbId<-NULL
remaining_All1$plotNumber<-NULL

sampled_All1$Location<-NULL
sampled_All1$location<-NULL
sampled_All1$Unit<-NULL
sampled_All1$X<-NULL
sampled_All1$blockNumber<-NULL
sampled_All1$germplasmDbId<-NULL
sampled_All1$plotNumber<-NULL


remaining_All1<-sapply(remaining_All1, as.numeric)
sampled_All1<-sapply(sampled_All1, as.numeric)

remaining_All1[is.infinite(remaining_All1)]<-0
remaining_All1[is.nan(remaining_All1)]<-0
remaining_All1[is.na(remaining_All1)]<-0

sampled_All1<-as.data.frame(sampled_All1)
remaining_All1<-as.data.frame(remaining_All1)

```

```{r Predictions}
xg<-xgb_model(remaining_All1, sampled_All1, "Grain.yield")
xg$RMSE
#475.259
xg$correlation
#0.8788541

rf<-rf_model(remaining_All1, sampled_All1, "Grain.yield")
rf$RMSE
rf$correlation
# 481.2577
#0.8755626

cat<-cat_model(remaining_All1, sampled_All1, "Grain.yield")
cat$RMSE
#471.8646
cat$correlation
#0.8807602

mb<-mboost_model(remaining_All1, sampled_All1, "Grain.yield")
mb$RMSE
mb$correlation
#500.3458
#0.8647161

pcr<-pcr_model(remaining_All1, sampled_All1, "Grain.yield")
pcr$RMSE
pcr$correlation
#455.5118
#0.8893193

bayesA<-bayesA_model(remaining_All1, sampled_All1, "Grain.yield")
bayesA$RMSE
bayesA$correlation
#466.5602
#0.8834409

bayesL<-bayesL_model(remaining_All1, sampled_All1, "Grain.yield")
bayesL$RMSE
bayesL$correlation
#466.8577
#0.8832884

bayesR<-bayesR_model(remaining_All1, sampled_All1, "Grain.yield")
bayesR$RMSE
bayesR$correlation

Ll<-lineal_model(remaining_All1, sampled_All1, "Grain.yield", alpha_value = 1)
Ll$RMSE
Ll$correlation
#465.1814
#0.8842242

Le<-lineal_model(remaining_All1, sampled_All1, "Grain.yield", alpha_value = 0.5)
Le$RMSE
Le$correlation
466.722
0.8834028


Lr<-lineal_model(remaining_All1, sampled_All1, "Grain.yield", alpha_value = 0)
Lr$RMSE
Lr$correlation

```

```{r Extract predictions}
xg_prediction<-xg$predictions
xg_prediction<-as.data.frame(xg_prediction)
xg_prediction$Unit<-sampled_All$Unit
xg_prediction$Block<-sampled_All$blockNumber
xg_prediction$Location<-sampled_All$Location
xg_prediction$id<-sampled_All$germplasmDbId


cat_prediction<-cat$predictions
cat_prediction<-as.data.frame(cat_prediction)
cat_prediction$Unit<-sampled_All$Unit
cat_prediction$Block<-sampled_All$blockNumber
cat_prediction$Location<-sampled_All$Location
cat_prediction$id<-sampled_All$germplasmDbId

rf_prediction<-rf$predictions
rf_prediction<-as.data.frame(rf_prediction)
rf_prediction$Unit<-sampled_All$Unit
rf_prediction$Block<-sampled_All$blockNumber
rf_prediction$Location<-sampled_All$Location
rf_prediction$id<-sampled_All$germplasmDbId

mb_prediction<-mb$predictions
mb_prediction<-as.data.frame(mb_prediction)
mb_prediction$Unit<-sampled_All$Unit
mb_prediction$Block<-sampled_All$blockNumber
mb_prediction$Location<-sampled_All$Location
mb_prediction$id<-sampled_All$germplasmDbId

pcr_prediction<-pcr$predictions
pcr_prediction<-as.data.frame(pcr_prediction)
pcr_prediction$Unit<-sampled_All$Unit
pcr_prediction$Block<-sampled_All$blockNumber
pcr_prediction$Location<-sampled_All$Location
pcr_prediction$id<-sampled_All$germplasmDbId

bayesA_prediction<-bayesA$predictions
bayesA_prediction<-as.data.frame(bayesA_prediction)
bayesA_prediction$Unit<-sampled_All$Unit
bayesA_prediction$Block<-sampled_All$blockNumber
bayesA_prediction$Location<-sampled_All$Location
bayesA_prediction$id<-sampled_All$germplasmDbId

bayesL_prediction<-bayesL$predictions
bayesL_prediction<-as.data.frame(bayesL_prediction)
bayesL_prediction$Unit<-sampled_All$Unit
bayesL_prediction$Block<-sampled_All$blockNumber
bayesL_prediction$Location<-sampled_All$Location
bayesL_prediction$id<-sampled_All$germplasmDbId


bayesR_prediction<-bayesR$predictions
bayesR_prediction<-as.data.frame(bayesR_prediction)
bayesR_prediction$Unit<-sampled_All$Unit
bayesR_prediction$Block<-sampled_All$blockNumber
bayesR_prediction$Location<-sampled_All$Location
bayesR_prediction$id<-sampled_All$germplasmDbId


Le_prediction<-Le$predictions
Le_prediction<-as.data.frame(Le_prediction)
Le_prediction$Unit<-sampled_All$Unit
Le_prediction$Block<-sampled_All$blockNumber
Le_prediction$Location<-sampled_All$Location
Le_prediction$id<-sampled_All$germplasmDbId


Ll_prediction<-Ll$predictions
Ll_prediction<-as.data.frame(Ll_prediction)
Ll_prediction$Unit<-sampled_All$Unit
Ll_prediction$Block<-sampled_All$blockNumber
Ll_prediction$Location<-sampled_All$Location
Ll_prediction$id<-sampled_All$germplasmDbId

Lr_prediction<-Lr$predictions
Lr_prediction<-as.data.frame(Lr_prediction)
Lr_prediction$Unit<-sampled_All$Unit
Lr_prediction$Block<-sampled_All$blockNumber
Lr_prediction$Location<-sampled_All$Location
Lr_prediction$id<-sampled_All$germplasmDbId

```

Visualization predictions
```{r}

compare_predictions("Xgboost"= xg_prediction$xg_prediction, "Random Forest"=rf_prediction$rf_prediction, "Mboost"=mb_prediction$mb_prediction, "catboost"=cat_prediction$cat_prediction, "pcr"= pcr_prediction$pcr_prediction, 
                    "Bayes A"=bayesA_prediction$bayesA_prediction, "Bayes Ridge"=bayesR_prediction$bayesR_prediction,"Lasso"=Ll_prediction$Ll_prediction, "Lineal Ridge"=Lr_prediction$Lr_prediction, "Lineal Elasticnet"=Le_prediction$Le_prediction, "Observed" = sampled_All1$Grain.yield)

compare_predictions("pcr"= pcr_prediction$pcr_prediction, "Lasso"=Ll_prediction$Ll_prediction, "Observed" = sampled_All1$Grain.yield)
```


Predictive Ability Comparison
```{r}

models<- c("mb", "rf", "xg", "cat", "pcr", "bayesA", "bayesL", "bayesR", "Ll", "Le", "Lr")
#loop to get results into a vector
pa_vec<-c()

for(i in 1:length(models)){
  pa_vec<- append(pa_vec, get(models[i])$correlation)
}

rmse_vec<-c()

for(i in 1:length(models)){
  rmse_vec<- append(rmse_vec, get(models[i])$RMSE)
}

#create data frame with model and predictive ability
Rtable<- data.frame(Model=models, Pred_Ability= pa_vec, RMSE= rmse_vec)

Rtable

```





Model for sample
```{r asreml}
library(asreml)

#set asreml options
asreml.options(maxit=500)

sampled_All$Unit<-as.factor(sampled_All$Unit)
sampled_All$blockNumber<-as.factor(sampled_All$blockNumber)
sampled_All$Location<-as.factor(sampled_All$Location)
sampled_All$plotNumber<-as.factor(sampled_All$plotNumber)
sampled_All$germplasmDbId<-as.factor(sampled_All$germplasmDbId)
sampled_All$Location<-as.factor(sampled_All$Location)

#Observed Grain yield with location
model_All <- asreml(fixed=Grain.yield ~ Location,  
                   random = ~ germplasmDbId + germplasmDbId:blockNumber + germplasmDbId:Location,
                   data = sampled_All,
                   na.action = na.method(y="include", x="include"))

model_All<-update(model_All)

#get hertability, report the matricies, by environment  
varcompAll<-summary(model_All)$varcomp

# Revisar los nombres disponibles
print(rownames(varcompAll))

# Assign variance components
#This will sum the genetic variance across all locations.
V_A_All <- sum(varcompAll[grep("germplasmDbId", rownames(varcompAll)), "component"], na.rm = TRUE)

V_E_All <- varcompAll[grep("units!R", rownames(varcompAll)), "component"]

V_GE_All <- varcompAll["germplasmDbId:Location", "component"]

# Calculate heritability
h2_All <- V_A_All / (V_A_All + V_E_All + V_GE_All)
print(h2_All)
#  0.2684015


# Get variance components
varcompAll <- summary(model_All)$varcomp
Vg_row <- grep("^germplasmDbId", rownames(varcompAll), value = TRUE)
Vg_All <- varcompAll[Vg_row[1], "component"]

# Predict BLUPs
G_hat_All <- predict(model_All, 
                     classify = "germplasmDbId", 
                     only = "germplasmDbId", 
                     sed = TRUE,
                     ignore = c("Location", "(Intercept)"))$pvals

# Check for NA std.errors
summary(G_hat_All$std.error)

# Remove rows with NA std.error
G_hat_All <- G_hat_All[!is.na(G_hat_All$std.error), ]

# Calculate reliability
se_All <- G_hat_All$std.error
pev_All <- se_All^2
rel_All <- 1 - (pev_All / Vg_All)

# Output
print(mean(rel_All, na.rm = TRUE))
#0.3007732

mean_rel_All<-mean(rel_All, na.rm = TRUE)

summary(rel_All)
# Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
# 0.2072  0.2075  0.2075  0.3008  0.4245  0.6942 


#############XG###########
xg_prediction$Unit<-as.factor(xg_prediction$Unit)
xg_prediction$Block<-as.factor(xg_prediction$Block)
xg_prediction$Location<-as.factor(xg_prediction$Location)
xg_prediction$id<-as.factor(xg_prediction$id)
# Observed Grain yield with Location
model_xg <- asreml(xg_prediction ~ Location,  
                    random = ~  id +
                      id:Block +  id:Location,
                     data = xg_prediction,
                    na.action = na.method(y="include", x="include"))


#get hertability, report the matricies, by environment  
varcomp_xg<-summary(model_xg)$varcomp

# Assign variance components
#This wixg sum the genetic variance across axg Locations.
V_A_xg <- sum(varcomp_xg[grep("id", rownames(varcomp_xg)), "component"], na.rm = TRUE)

V_E_xg <- varcomp_xg[grep("units!R", rownames(varcomp_xg)), "component"]

V_GE_xg <- varcomp_xg["id:Location", "component"]

# Calculate heritability
h2_xg <- V_A_xg / (V_A_xg + V_E_xg + V_GE_xg)
print(h2_xg)
# 0.09122777


#save genetic variance in an object
Vg_xg<- summary(model_xg)$varcomp['id', 'component']


#get the coefficients of the genotype effect
Vg_row_xg <- grep("^id", rownames(varcomp_xg), value = TRUE)
Vg_xg <- varcomp_xg[Vg_row_xg[1], "component"]

# Predict BLUPs
# Predict BLUPs
G_hat_xg <- predict(model_xg, 
                     classify = "id", 
                     only = "id", 
                     sed = TRUE,
                     ignore = c("Location", "(Intercept)"))$pvals


# Check for NA std.errors
summary(G_hat_xg$std.error)

# Remove rows with NA std.error
G_hat_xg <- G_hat_xg[!is.na(G_hat_xg$std.error), ]

# Calculate reliability
se_xg <- G_hat_xg$std.error
pev_xg <- se_xg^2
rel_xg <- 1 - (pev_xg / Vg_xg)

# Output
print(mean(rel_xg, na.rm = TRUE))
# 0.1325025

mean_rel_xg<-mean(rel_xg, na.rm = TRUE)


summary(rel_xg)
# Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
#0.07786 0.07798 0.07799 0.13250 0.20021 0.45445 


######catboost####
cat_prediction$Unit<-as.factor(cat_prediction$Unit)
cat_prediction$Block<-as.factor(cat_prediction$Block)
cat_prediction$Location<-as.factor(cat_prediction$Location)
cat_prediction$id<-as.factor(cat_prediction$id)
# Observed Grain yield with location
model_cat <- asreml(cat_prediction ~ Location,  
                    random = ~  id +
                      id:Block +  id:Location,
                     data = cat_prediction,
                    na.action = na.method(y="include", x="include"))


#get hertability, report the matricies, by environment  
varcomp_cat<-summary(model_cat)$varcomp

# Assign variance components
#This wicat sum the genetic variance across acat locations.
V_A_cat <- sum(varcomp_cat[grep("id", rownames(varcomp_cat)), "component"], na.rm = TRUE)

V_E_cat <- varcomp_cat[grep("units!R", rownames(varcomp_cat)), "component"]

V_GE_cat <- varcomp_cat["id:Location", "component"]

# Calculate heritability
h2_cat <- V_A_cat / (V_A_cat + V_E_cat + V_GE_cat)
print(h2_cat)
#  0.09055661


#save genetic variance in an object
Vg_cat<- summary(model_cat)$varcomp['id', 'component']


#get the coefficients of the genotype effect
Vg_row_cat <- grep("^id", rownames(varcomp_cat), value = TRUE)
Vg_cat <- varcomp_cat[Vg_row_cat[1], "component"]

# Predict BLUPs
# Predict BLUPs
G_hat_cat <- predict(model_cat, 
                     classify = "id", 
                     only = "id", 
                     sed = TRUE,
                     ignore = c("Location", "(Intercept)"))$pvals


# Check for NA std.errors
summary(G_hat_cat$std.error)

# Remove rows with NA std.error
G_hat_cat <- G_hat_cat[!is.na(G_hat_cat$std.error), ]

# Calculate reliability
se_cat <- G_hat_cat$std.error
pev_cat <- se_cat^2
rel_cat <- 1 - (pev_cat / Vg_cat)

# Output
print(mean(rel_cat, na.rm = TRUE))
# 0.1513444

mean_rel_cat<-mean(rel_cat, na.rm = TRUE)


summary(rel_cat)
# Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
# 0.09026 0.09040 0.09042 0.15134 0.22912 0.49779 


######RF####
rf_prediction$Unit<-as.factor(rf_prediction$Unit)
rf_prediction$Block<-as.factor(rf_prediction$Block)
rf_prediction$Location<-as.factor(rf_prediction$Location)
rf_prediction$id<-as.factor(rf_prediction$id)
# Observed Grain yield with location
model_rf <- asreml(rf_prediction ~ Location,  
                    random = ~  id +
                      id:Block +  id:Location,
                     data = rf_prediction,
                    na.action = na.method(y="include", x="include"))


#get hertability, report the matricies, by environment  
varcomp_rf<-summary(model_rf)$varcomp

# Assign variance components
#This wirf sum the genetic variance across arf locations.
V_A_rf <- sum(varcomp_rf[grep("id", rownames(varcomp_rf)), "component"], na.rm = TRUE)

V_E_rf <- varcomp_rf[grep("units!R", rownames(varcomp_rf)), "component"]

V_GE_rf <- varcomp_rf["id:Location", "component"]

# Calculate heritability
h2_rf <- V_A_rf / (V_A_rf + V_E_rf + V_GE_rf)
print(h2_rf)
# 0.07901525


#save genetic variance in an object
Vg_rf<- summary(model_rf)$varcomp['id', 'component']


#get the coefficients of the genotype effect
Vg_row_rf <- grep("^id", rownames(varcomp_rf), value = TRUE)
Vg_rf <- varcomp_rf[Vg_row_rf[1], "component"]

# Predict BLUPs
# Predict BLUPs
G_hat_rf <- predict(model_rf, 
                     classify = "id", 
                     only = "id", 
                     sed = TRUE,
                     ignore = c("Location", "(Intercept)"))$pvals


# Check for NA std.errors
summary(G_hat_rf$std.error)

# Remove rows with NA std.error
G_hat_rf <- G_hat_rf[!is.na(G_hat_rf$std.error), ]

# Calculate reliability
se_rf <- G_hat_rf$std.error
pev_rf <- se_rf^2
rel_rf <- 1 - (pev_rf / Vg_rf)

# Output
print(mean(rel_rf, na.rm = TRUE))
# 0.1341654

mean_rel_rf<-mean(rel_rf, na.rm = TRUE)


summary(rel_rf)
#in. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
#0.07875 0.07887 0.07889 0.13417 0.20389 0.46066 


######Mboots####
mb_prediction$Unit<-as.factor(mb_prediction$Unit)
mb_prediction$Block<-as.factor(mb_prediction$Block)
mb_prediction$Location<-as.factor(mb_prediction$Location)
mb_prediction$id<-as.factor(mb_prediction$id)
# Observed Grain yield with location
model_mb <- asreml(mb_prediction ~ Location,  
                    random = ~  id +
                      id:Block +  id:Location,
                     data = mb_prediction,
                    na.action = na.method(y="include", x="include"))


#get hertability, report the matricies, by environment  
varcomp_mb<-summary(model_mb)$varcomp

# Assign variance components
#This wimb sum the genetic variance across amb locations.
V_A_mb <- sum(varcomp_mb[grep("id", rownames(varcomp_mb)), "component"], na.rm = TRUE)

V_E_mb <- varcomp_mb[grep("units!R", rownames(varcomp_mb)), "component"]

V_GE_mb <- varcomp_mb["id:Location", "component"]

# Calculate heritability
h2_mb <- V_A_mb / (V_A_mb + V_E_mb + V_GE_mb)
print(h2_mb)
#  0.08206957


#save genetic variance in an object
Vg_mb<- summary(model_mb)$varcomp['id', 'component']


#get the coefficients of the genotype effect
Vg_row_mb <- grep("^id", rownames(varcomp_mb), value = TRUE)
Vg_mb <- varcomp_mb[Vg_row_mb[1], "component"]

# Predict BLUPs
# Predict BLUPs
G_hat_mb <- predict(model_mb, 
                     classify = "id", 
                     only = "id", 
                     sed = TRUE,
                     ignore = c("Location", "(Intercept)"))$pvals


# Check for NA std.errors
summary(G_hat_mb$std.error)

# Remove rows with NA std.error
G_hat_mb <- G_hat_mb[!is.na(G_hat_mb$std.error), ]

# Calculate reliability
se_mb <- G_hat_mb$std.error
pev_mb <- se_mb^2
rel_mb <- 1 - (pev_mb / Vg_mb)

# Output
print(mean(rel_mb, na.rm = TRUE))
# 0.1387731

mean_rel_mb<-mean(rel_mb, na.rm = TRUE)


summary(rel_mb)
# Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
#0.08181 0.08193 0.08195 0.13877 0.21067 0.47092 

######PCR#######
pcr_prediction$Unit<-as.factor(pcr_prediction$Unit)
pcr_prediction$Block<-as.factor(pcr_prediction$Block)
pcr_prediction$Location<-as.factor(pcr_prediction$Location)
pcr_prediction$id<-as.factor(pcr_prediction$id)
# Observed Grain yield with location
model_pcr <- asreml(pcr_prediction ~ Location,  
                    random = ~  id +
                      id:Block +  id:Location,
                     data = pcr_prediction,
                    na.action = na.method(y="include", x="include"))


#get hertability, report the matricies, by environment  
varcomp_pcr<-summary(model_pcr)$varcomp

# Assign variance components
#This wipcr sum the genetic variance across apcr locations.
V_A_pcr <- sum(varcomp_pcr[grep("id", rownames(varcomp_pcr)), "component"], na.rm = TRUE)

V_E_pcr <- varcomp_pcr[grep("units!R", rownames(varcomp_pcr)), "component"]

V_GE_pcr <- varcomp_pcr["id:Location", "component"]

# Calculate heritability
h2_pcr <- V_A_pcr / (V_A_pcr + V_E_pcr + V_GE_pcr)
print(h2_pcr)
# 0.1222685


#save genetic variance in an object
Vg_pcr<- summary(model_pcr)$varcomp['id', 'component']


#get the coefficients of the genotype effect
Vg_row_pcr <- grep("^id", rownames(varcomp_pcr), value = TRUE)
Vg_pcr <- varcomp_pcr[Vg_row_pcr[1], "component"]

# Predict BLUPs
# Predict BLUPs
G_hat_pcr <- predict(model_pcr, 
                     classify = "id", 
                     only = "id", 
                     sed = TRUE,
                     ignore = c("Location", "(Intercept)"))$pvals


# Check for NA std.errors
summary(G_hat_pcr$std.error)

# Remove rows with NA std.error
G_hat_pcr <- G_hat_pcr[!is.na(G_hat_pcr$std.error), ]

# Calculate reliability
se_pcr <- G_hat_pcr$std.error
pev_pcr <- se_pcr^2
rel_pcr <- 1 - (pev_pcr / Vg_pcr)

# Output
print(mean(rel_pcr, na.rm = TRUE))
# 0.1857895

mean_rel_pcr<-mean(rel_pcr, na.rm = TRUE)


summary(rel_pcr)
# Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
# 0.1145  0.1146  0.1147  0.1858  0.2779  0.5617 


#####BayesA######
bayesA_prediction$Unit<-as.factor(bayesA_prediction$Unit)
bayesA_prediction$Block<-as.factor(bayesA_prediction$Block)
bayesA_prediction$Location<-as.factor(bayesA_prediction$Location)
bayesA_prediction$id<-as.factor(bayesA_prediction$id)
# Observed Grain yield with location
model_bayesA <- asreml(bayesA_prediction ~ Location,  
                    random = ~  id +
                      id:Block +  id:Location,
                     data = bayesA_prediction,
                    na.action = na.method(y="include", x="include"))


#get hertability, report the matricies, by environment  
varcomp_bayesA<-summary(model_bayesA)$varcomp

# Assign variance components
#This wibayesA sum the genetic variance across abayesA locations.
V_A_bayesA <- sum(varcomp_bayesA[grep("id", rownames(varcomp_bayesA)), "component"], na.rm = TRUE)

V_E_bayesA <- varcomp_bayesA[grep("units!R", rownames(varcomp_bayesA)), "component"]

V_GE_bayesA <- varcomp_bayesA["id:Location", "component"]

# Calculate heritability
h2_bayesA <- V_A_bayesA / (V_A_bayesA + V_E_bayesA + V_GE_bayesA)
print(h2_bayesA)
# 0.1287356


#save genetic variance in an object
Vg_bayesA<- summary(model_bayesA)$varcomp['id', 'component']


#get the coefficients of the genotype effect
Vg_row_bayesA <- grep("^id", rownames(varcomp_bayesA), value = TRUE)
Vg_bayesA <- varcomp_bayesA[Vg_row_bayesA[1], "component"]

# Predict BLUPs
G_hat_bayesA <- predict(model_bayesA, 
                     classify = "id", 
                     only = "id", 
                     sed = TRUE,
                     ignore = c("Location", "(Intercept)"))$pvals

# Check for NA std.errors
summary(G_hat_bayesA$std.error)

# Remove rows with NA std.error
G_hat_bayesA <- G_hat_bayesA[!is.na(G_hat_bayesA$std.error), ]

# Calculate reliability
se_bayesA <- G_hat_bayesA$std.error
pev_bayesA <- se_bayesA^2
rel_bayesA <- 1 - (pev_bayesA / Vg_bayesA)

# Output
print(mean(rel_bayesA, na.rm = TRUE))
# 0.1836154

mean_rel_bayesA<-mean(rel_bayesA, na.rm = TRUE)


summary(rel_bayesA)
#  Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
# 0.1131  0.1133  0.1133  0.1836  0.2738  0.5563 

#####BayesL#####
bayesL_prediction$Unit<-as.factor(bayesL_prediction$Unit)
bayesL_prediction$Block<-as.factor(bayesL_prediction$Block)
bayesL_prediction$Location<-as.factor(bayesL_prediction$Location)
bayesL_prediction$id<-as.factor(bayesL_prediction$id)
# Observed Grain yield with location
model_bayesL <- asreml(bayesL_prediction ~ Location,  
                    random = ~  id +
                      id:Block +  id:Location,
                     data = bayesL_prediction,
                    na.action = na.method(y="include", x="include"))


#get hertability, report the matricies, by environment  
varcomp_bayesL<-summary(model_bayesL)$varcomp

# Assign variance components
#This wibayesL sum the genetic variance across abayesL locations.
V_A_bayesL <- sum(varcomp_bayesL[grep("id", rownames(varcomp_bayesL)), "component"], na.rm = TRUE)

V_E_bayesL <- varcomp_bayesL[grep("units!R", rownames(varcomp_bayesL)), "component"]

V_GE_bayesL <- varcomp_bayesL["id:Location", "component"]

# Calculate heritability
h2_bayesL <- V_A_bayesL / (V_A_bayesL + V_E_bayesL + V_GE_bayesL)
print(h2_bayesL)
#  0.1200838


#save genetic variance in an object
Vg_bayesL<- summary(model_bayesL)$varcomp['id', 'component']


#get the coefficients of the genotype effect
Vg_row_bayesL <- grep("^id", rownames(varcomp_bayesL), value = TRUE)
Vg_bayesL <- varcomp_bayesL[Vg_row_bayesL[1], "component"]

# Predict BLUPs
G_hat_bayesL <- predict(model_bayesL, 
                     classify = "id", 
                     only = "id", 
                     sed = TRUE,
                     ignore = c("Location", (Intercept))$pvals)

# Check for NA std.errors
summary(G_hat_bayesL$std.error)

# Remove rows with NA std.error
G_hat_bayesL <- G_hat_bayesL[!is.na(G_hat_bayesL$std.error), ]

# Calculate reliability
se_bayesL <- G_hat_bayesL$std.error
pev_bayesL <- se_bayesL^2
rel_bayesL <- 1 - (pev_bayesL / Vg_bayesL)

# Output
print(mean(rel_bayesL, na.rm = TRUE))
# 0.1804401

mean_rel_bayesL<-mean(rel_bayesL, na.rm = TRUE)


summary(rel_bayesL)
 #Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
 #0.1072  0.1080  0.1081  0.1804  0.2754  0.5630

#####BayesR########
bayesR_prediction$Unit<-as.factor(bayesR_prediction$Unit)
bayesR_prediction$Block<-as.factor(bayesR_prediction$Block)
bayesR_prediction$Location<-as.factor(bayesR_prediction$Location)
bayesR_prediction$id<-as.factor(bayesR_prediction$id)
# Observed Grain yield with location
model_bayesR <- asreml(bayesR_prediction ~ Location,  
                    random = ~  id +
                      id:Block +  id:Location,
                     data = bayesR_prediction,
                    na.action = na.method(y="include", x="include"))


#get hertability, report the matricies, by environment  
varcomp_bayesR<-summary(model_bayesR)$varcomp

# Assign variance components
#This wibayesR sum the genetic variance across abayesR locations.
V_A_bayesR <- sum(varcomp_bayesR[grep("id", rownames(varcomp_bayesR)), "component"], na.rm = TRUE)

V_E_bayesR <- varcomp_bayesR[grep("units!R", rownames(varcomp_bayesR)), "component"]

V_GE_bayesR <- varcomp_bayesR["id:Location", "component"]

# Calculate heritability
h2_bayesR <- V_A_bayesR / (V_A_bayesR + V_E_bayesR + V_GE_bayesR)
print(h2_bayesR)
# 0.1259243


#save genetic variance in an object
Vg_bayesR<- summary(model_bayesR)$varcomp['id', 'component']


#get the coefficients of the genotype effect
Vg_row_bayesR <- grep("^id", rownames(varcomp_bayesR), value = TRUE)
Vg_bayesR <- varcomp_bayesR[Vg_row_bayesR[1], "component"]

# Predict BLUPs
G_hat_bayesR <- predict(model_bayesR, 
                     classify = "id", 
                     only = "id", 
                     sed = TRUE,
                     ignore = c("Location", (Intercept))$pvals)

# Check for NA std.errors
summary(G_hat_bayesR$std.error)

# Remove rows with NA std.error
G_hat_bayesR <- G_hat_bayesR[!is.na(G_hat_bayesR$std.error), ]

# Calculate reliability
se_bayesR <- G_hat_bayesR$std.error
pev_bayesR <- se_bayesR^2
rel_bayesR <- 1 - (pev_bayesR / Vg_bayesR)

# Output
print(mean(rel_bayesR, na.rm = TRUE))
# 0.166605

mean_rel_bayesR<-mean(rel_bayesR, na.rm = TRUE)


summary(rel_bayesR)
#  Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
# 0.09403 0.09479 0.09486 0.16661 0.26043 0.54956 


########lineal lasso########
Ll_prediction$Unit<-as.factor(Ll_prediction$Unit)
Ll_prediction$Block<-as.factor(Ll_prediction$Block)
Ll_prediction$Location<-as.factor(Ll_prediction$Location)
Ll_prediction$id<-as.factor(Ll_prediction$id)
# Observed Grain yield with location
model_Ll <- asreml(Ll_prediction ~ Location,  
                    random = ~  id +
                      id:Block +  id:Location,
                     data = Ll_prediction,
                    na.action = na.method(y="include", x="include"))


#get hertability, report the matricies, by environment  
varcomp_Ll<-summary(model_Ll)$varcomp

# Assign variance components
#This will sum the genetic variance across all locations.
V_A_Ll <- sum(varcomp_Ll[grep("id", rownames(varcomp_Ll)), "component"], na.rm = TRUE)

V_E_Ll <- varcomp_Ll[grep("units!R", rownames(varcomp_Ll)), "component"]

V_GE_Ll <- varcomp_Ll["id:Location", "component"]

# Calculate heritability
h2_Ll <- V_A_Ll / (V_A_Ll + V_E_Ll + V_GE_Ll)
print(h2_Ll)
# 0.1354659


#save genetic variance in an object
Vg_Ll<- summary(model_Ll)$varcomp['id', 'component']


#get the coefficients of the genotype effect
Vg_row_Ll <- grep("^id", rownames(varcomp_Ll), value = TRUE)
Vg_Ll <- varcomp_Ll[Vg_row_Ll[1], "component"]

# Predict BLUPs
G_hat_Ll <- predict(model_Ll, 
                     classify = "id", 
                     only = "id", 
                     sed = TRUE,
                     ignore = c("Location", (Intercept))$pvals)

# Check for NA std.errors
summary(G_hat_Ll$std.error)

# Remove rows with NA std.error
G_hat_Ll <- G_hat_Ll[!is.na(G_hat_Ll$std.error), ]

# Calculate reliability
se_Ll <- G_hat_Ll$std.error
pev_Ll <- se_Ll^2
rel_Ll <- 1 - (pev_Ll / Vg_Ll)

# Output
print(mean(rel_Ll, na.rm = TRUE))
# 0.1723428

mean_rel_ll<-mean(rel_Ll, na.rm = TRUE)


summary(rel_Ll)
#  Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
# 0.09761 0.09840 0.09848 0.17234 0.26935 0.56119 

#####linear ridge######
Lr_prediction$Unit<-as.factor(Lr_prediction$Unit)
Lr_prediction$Block<-as.factor(Lr_prediction$Block)
Lr_prediction$Location<-as.factor(Lr_prediction$Location)
Lr_prediction$id<-as.factor(Lr_prediction$id)
# Observed Grain yield with location
model_Lr <- asreml(Lr_prediction ~ Location,  
                    random = ~  id + Location:Block  + id:Location,
                     data = Lr_prediction,
                    na.action = na.method(y="include", x="include"))

model_Lr<-update(model_Lr)

#get hertability, report the matricies, by environment  
varcomp_Lr<-summary(model_Lr)$varcomp

# Assign variance components
#This wiLr sum the genetic variance across aLr locations.
V_A_Lr <- sum(varcomp_Lr[grep("id", rownames(varcomp_Lr)), "component"], na.rm = TRUE)

V_E_Lr <- varcomp_Lr[grep("units!R", rownames(varcomp_Lr)), "component"]

V_GE_Lr <- varcomp_Lr[grep("id:Location", rownames(varcomp_Lr)), "component"]

# Calculate heritability
h2_Lr <- V_A_Lr / (V_A_Lr + V_E_Lr + V_GE_Lr)
print(h2_Lr)
#  0.119025


#save genetic variance in an object
Vg_Lr<- summary(model_Lr)$varcomp['id', 'component']


#get the coefficients of the genotype effect
Vg_row_Lr <- grep("^id", rownames(varcomp_Lr), value = TRUE)
Vg_Lr <- varcomp_Lr[Vg_row_Lr[1], "component"]

# Predict BLUPs
G_hat_Lr <- predict(model_Lr, 
                     classify = "id", 
                     only = "id", 
                     sed = TRUE,
                     ignore = c("Location", (Intercept))$pvals)

# Check for NA std.errors
summary(G_hat_Lr$std.error)

# Remove rows with NA std.error
G_hat_Lr <- G_hat_Lr[!is.na(G_hat_Lr$std.error), ]

# Calculate reliability
se_Lr <- G_hat_Lr$std.error
pev_Lr <- se_Lr^2
rel_Lr <- 1 - (pev_Lr / Vg_Lr)

# Output
print(mean(rel_Lr, na.rm = TRUE))
# 0.1621163

mean_rel_lr<-mean(rel_Lr, na.rm = TRUE)


summary(rel_Lr)
# Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
#0.09972 0.10033 0.10039 0.16212 0.24143 0.51064 


####linear elastinet####
Le_prediction$Unit<-as.factor(Le_prediction$Unit)
Le_prediction$Block<-as.factor(Le_prediction$Block)
Le_prediction$Location<-as.factor(Le_prediction$Location)
Le_prediction$id<-as.factor(Le_prediction$id)
# Observed Grain yield with location
model_Le <- asreml(Le_prediction ~ Location ,  
                    random = ~  id +
                             Location:Block  + id:Location,
                     data = Le_prediction,
                    na.action = na.method(y="include", x="include"))

model_Le<-update(model_Le)

#get hertability, report the matricies, by environment  
varcomp_Le<-summary(model_Le)$varcomp


# Assign variance components
#This Le sum the genetic variance across aLe locations.
V_A_Le <- sum(varcomp_Le[grep("id", rownames(varcomp_Le)), "component"], na.rm = TRUE)

V_E_Le <- varcomp_Le[grep("units!R", rownames(varcomp_Le)), "component"]

V_GE_Le <- varcomp_Le[grep("id:Location", rownames(varcomp_Le)), "component"]

# Calculate heritability
h2_Le <- V_A_Le / (V_A_Le + V_E_Le + V_GE_Le )
print(h2_Le)
#  0.1474399

#save genetic variance in an object
Vg_Le<- summary(model_Le)$varcomp

#get the coefficients of the genotype effect
Vg_row_Le <- grep("^id", rownames(varcomp_Le), value = TRUE)
Vg_Le <- varcomp_Le[Vg_row_Le[1], "component"]

# Predict BLUPs
G_hat_Le <- predict(model_Le, 
                     classify = "id", 
                     only = "id", 
                     sed = TRUE,
                     ignore = c("Location", "(Intercept)"))$pvals

# Check for NA std.errors
summary(G_hat_Le$std.error)

# Remove rows with NA std.error
G_hat_Le <- G_hat_Le[!is.na(G_hat_Le$std.error), ]

# Calculate reliability
se_Le <- G_hat_Le$std.error
pev_Le <- se_Le^2
rel_Le <- 1 - (pev_Le / Vg_Le)

# Output
print(mean(rel_Le, na.rm = TRUE))
#0.2130821

mean_rel_le<-mean(rel_Le, na.rm = TRUE)

summary(rel_Le)
#Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
# 0.1416  0.1424  0.1425  0.2131  0.3059  0.5841 
```
Heritability and reliability index
```{r}
# Match all NDVI columns
ndvi_columns <- grep("^NDVI_", names(sampled_All), value = TRUE)

results_list <- list()
results_summary <- data.frame(
  Trait = character(),
  Heritability = numeric(),
  Genetic_Variance = numeric(),
  Mean_Reliability = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

if (length(ndvi_columns) > 0) {
  for (col in ndvi_columns) {
    valid_data <- sampled_All[!is.na(sampled_All[[col]]), ]
    valid_data$germplasmDbId <- as.factor(valid_data$germplasmDbId)
    valid_data$Location <- as.factor(valid_data$Location)
    valid_data$blockNumber <- as.factor(valid_data$blockNumber)

    tryCatch({
      formula <- as.formula(paste(col, "~ Location"))
      model <- asreml(
        fixed = formula,
        random = ~ germplasmDbId + blockNumber + germplasmDbId:blockNumber,
        data = valid_data,
        na.action = na.method(y = "include", x = "include")
      )
      varcomp <- summary(model)$varcomp

      if ("germplasmDbId" %in% rownames(varcomp)) {
        Vg <- sum(varcomp[grep("germplasmDbId", rownames(varcomp)), "component"], na.rm = TRUE)
        V_E <- varcomp[grep("units", rownames(varcomp)), "component"]
        V_GE <- varcomp["germplasmDbId:blockNumber", "component"]
        h2 <- Vg / (Vg + V_GE + V_E)

        # Debugging: Print Vg and h2
        print(paste("Trait:", col, "Vg:", Vg, "h2:", h2))

        # Predict BLUPs for germplasmDbId
        G_hat <- predict(model, classify = "germplasmDbId", only = "germplasmDbId", sed = TRUE, ignore = c("Location","(Intercept)"))$pvals
        G_hat <- G_hat[!is.na(G_hat$std.error), ]

        # Debugging: Print G_hat
        print(G_hat)

        # Calculate reliability
        if (nrow(G_hat) > 0) {
          se <- G_hat$std.error
          pev <- se^2
          rel <- 1 - (pev / Vg)
          mean_rel <- mean(rel, na.rm = TRUE)
        } else {
          rel <- NA
          mean_rel <- NA
        }
      } else {
        h2 <- NA
        Vg <- NA
        rel <- NA
        mean_rel <- NA
      }

      # Store results in the list
      results_list[[col]] <- list(model = model, h2 = h2, Vg = Vg, rel = rel)

      # Append results to the summary data frame
      results_summary <- rbind(results_summary, data.frame(
        Trait = col,
        Heritability = round(h2, 3),
        Genetic_Variance = round(Vg, 6),
        Mean_Reliability = round(mean_rel, 3),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }, error = function(e) {
      message(paste("Error in model for column:", col, " - ", e$message))
    })
  }

  # Print the summary of results
  print(results_summary)
} else {
  message("No NDVI columns found.")
}

```

```{r}
# Match all GNDVI columns
GNDVI_columns <- grep("^GNDVI_", names(sampled_All), value = TRUE)

results_list <- list()
results_GNDVI <- data.frame(
  Trait = character(),
  Heritability = numeric(),
  Genetic_Variance = numeric(),
  Mean_Reliability = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

if (length(GNDVI_columns) > 0) {
  for (col in GNDVI_columns) {
    valid_data <- sampled_All[!is.na(sampled_All[[col]]), ]
    valid_data$germplasmDbId <- as.factor(valid_data$germplasmDbId)
    valid_data$Location <- as.factor(valid_data$Location)
    valid_data$blockNumber <- as.factor(valid_data$blockNumber)

    tryCatch({
      formula <- as.formula(paste(col, "~ Location"))
      model <- asreml(
        fixed = formula,
        random = ~ germplasmDbId + blockNumber + germplasmDbId:blockNumber,
        data = valid_data,
        na.action = na.method(y = "include", x = "include")
      )
      varcomp <- summary(model)$varcomp

      if ("germplasmDbId" %in% rownames(varcomp)) {
        Vg <- sum(varcomp[grep("germplasmDbId", rownames(varcomp)), "component"], na.rm = TRUE)
        V_E <- varcomp[grep("units", rownames(varcomp)), "component"]
        V_GE <- varcomp["germplasmDbId:blockNumber", "component"]
        h2 <- Vg / (Vg + V_GE + V_E)

        # Debugging: Print Vg and h2
        print(paste("Trait:", col, "Vg:", Vg, "h2:", h2))

        # Predict BLUPs for germplasmDbId
        G_hat <- predict(model, classify = "germplasmDbId", only = "germplasmDbId", sed = TRUE, ignore = "(Intercept)")$pvals
        G_hat <- G_hat[!is.na(G_hat$std.error), ]

        # Debugging: Print G_hat
        print(G_hat)

        # Calculate reliability
        if (nrow(G_hat) > 0) {
          se <- G_hat$std.error
          pev <- se^2
          rel <- 1 - (pev / Vg)
          mean_rel <- mean(rel, na.rm = TRUE)
        } else {
          rel <- NA
          mean_rel <- NA
        }
      } else {
        h2 <- NA
        Vg <- NA
        rel <- NA
        mean_rel <- NA
      }

      # Store results in the list
      results_list[[col]] <- list(model = model, h2 = h2, Vg = Vg, rel = rel)

      # Append results to the summary data frame
      results_GNDVI <- rbind(results_GNDVI, data.frame(
        Trait = col,
        Heritability = round(h2, 3),
        Genetic_Variance = round(Vg, 6),
        Mean_Reliability = round(mean_rel, 3),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }, error = function(e) {
      message(paste("Error in model for column:", col, " - ", e$message))
    })
  }

  # Print the summary of results
  print(results_GNDVI)
} else {
  message("No GNDVI columns found.")
}
```


```{r}
# Match all EVI columns
EVI_columns <- grep("^EVI_", names(sampled_All), value = TRUE)

results_list <- list()
results_EVI <- data.frame(
  Trait = character(),
  Heritability = numeric(),
  Genetic_Variance = numeric(),
  Mean_Reliability = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

if (length(EVI_columns) > 0) {
  for (col in EVI_columns) {
    valid_data <- sampled_All[!is.na(sampled_All[[col]]), ]
    valid_data$germplasmDbId <- as.factor(valid_data$germplasmDbId)
    valid_data$Location <- as.factor(valid_data$Location)
    valid_data$blockNumber <- as.factor(valid_data$blockNumber)

    tryCatch({
      formula <- as.formula(paste(col, "~ Location"))
      model <- asreml(
        fixed = formula,
        random = ~ germplasmDbId + blockNumber + germplasmDbId:blockNumber,
        data = valid_data,
        na.action = na.method(y = "include", x = "include")
      )
      varcomp <- summary(model)$varcomp

      if ("germplasmDbId" %in% rownames(varcomp)) {
        Vg <- sum(varcomp[grep("germplasmDbId", rownames(varcomp)), "component"], na.rm = TRUE)
        V_E <- varcomp[grep("units", rownames(varcomp)), "component"]
        V_GE <- varcomp["germplasmDbId:blockNumber", "component"]
        h2 <- Vg / (Vg + V_GE + V_E)

        # Debugging: Print Vg and h2
        print(paste("Trait:", col, "Vg:", Vg, "h2:", h2))

        # Predict BLUPs for germplasmDbId
        G_hat <- predict(model, classify = "germplasmDbId", only = "germplasmDbId", sed = TRUE, ignore = "(Intercept)")$pvals
        G_hat <- G_hat[!is.na(G_hat$std.error), ]

        # Debugging: Print G_hat
        print(G_hat)

        # Calculate reliability
        if (nrow(G_hat) > 0) {
          se <- G_hat$std.error
          pev <- se^2
          rel <- 1 - (pev / Vg)
          mean_rel <- mean(rel, na.rm = TRUE)
        } else {
          rel <- NA
          mean_rel <- NA
        }
      } else {
        h2 <- NA
        Vg <- NA
        rel <- NA
        mean_rel <- NA
      }

      # Store results in the list
      results_list[[col]] <- list(model = model, h2 = h2, Vg = Vg, rel = rel)

      # Append results to the summary data frame
      results_EVI <- rbind(results_EVI, data.frame(
        Trait = col,
        Heritability = round(h2, 3),
        Genetic_Variance = round(Vg, 6),
        Mean_Reliability = round(mean_rel, 3),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }, error = function(e) {
      message(paste("Error in model for column:", col, " - ", e$message))
    })
  }

  # Print the summary of results
  print(results_EVI)
} else {
  message("No EVI columns found.")
}
```


```{r}

models<- c("h2_mb", "h2_rf", "h2_xg", "h2_cat", "h2_pcr", "h2_BayesA", "h2_bayesL", "h2_bayesR", "h2_Ll", "h2_Le", "h2_Lr", "h2_All")
#loop to get results into a vector
h<-c()

for(i in 1:length(models)){
  h<- append(h, get(models[i]))
}


model1s<- c("mean_rel_mb", "mean_rel_rf", "mean_rel_xg", "mean_rel_cat", "mean_rel_pcr", "mean_rel_bayesA", "mean_rel_bayesL", "mean_rel_bayesR", "mean_rel_ll", "mean_rel_le", "mean_rel_lr", "mean_rel_All")
#loop to get results into a vector
r<-c()

for(i in 1:length(model1s)){
  r<- append(r, get(model1s[i]))
}

model2<- c("mb", "rf", "xg", "cat", "pcr", "bayesA", "bayesL", "bayesR", "ll", "le", "lr", "All")

#create data frame with model and predictive ability
Table_rh<- data.frame(Model=model2, Mean_Reliability=r, Heritability=h)

Table_rh
```
```{r}
# Load libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
# Reshape to long format for plotting
df_long <- pivot_longer(Table_rh,
                        cols = c(Heritability, Mean_Reliability),
                        names_to = "Metric",
                        values_to = "Value")

# Plot grouped bar chart
ggplot(df_long, aes(x = Model, y = Value, fill = Metric)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("steelblue", "orange")) +
  labs(title = "Heritability and Mean Reliability by Trait",
       x = "Trait",
       y = "Value",
       fill = "Metric") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  ylim(0, 1)




```

Boxplot
```{r}
results_summary$index<-"NDVI"
results_GNDVI$index<-"GNDVI"
results_EVI$index<-"EVI"

indexRH<-rbind(results_summary, results_GNDVI)

indexRH<-rbind(indexRH, results_EVI)

indexRH$Genetic_Variance<-NULL

# Reshape the data to long format
indexRHv <-indexRH %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Heritability, Mean_Reliability), names_to = "Measure", values_to = "Value")



# Plot boxplot with jitter, grouped by index and colored by Measure
ggplot(indexRHv, aes(x = index, y = Value, fill = Measure)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +  # dodge to separate boxes side-by-side
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Measure), size = 2, alpha = 0.7, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +  # jitter also dodged to align with boxes
  labs(x = "Index", y = "Value") +
  theme_minimal() +   scale_fill_manual(values = c("darkgreen", "orange")) + scale_color_manual(values = c("purple", "blue")) +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"))


```

```{r f}


#Observed Grain yield with location
model_NDVI_10 <- asreml(fixed=NDVI_10 ~ Location,  
                   random = ~ germplasmDbId +
                             Location:blockNumber  + germplasmDbId:Location,
                   data = sampled_All,
                   na.action = na.method(y="include", x="include"))

model_NDVI_10<-update(model_NDVI_10)

#get hertability, report the matricies, by environment  
varcompNDVI_10<-summary(model_NDVI_10)$varcomp
View(varcompNDVI_10)
# Revisar los nombres disponibles
print(rownames(varcompNDVI_10))
varcompNDVI_10<-summary(model_NDVI_10)$varcomp
# Assign variance components
#This will sum the genetic variance across NDVI_10 locations.
V_A_NDVI_10 <- sum(varcompNDVI_10[grep("germplasmDbId", rownames(varcompNDVI_10)), "component"], na.rm = TRUE)

V_E_NDVI_10 <- varcompNDVI_10[grep("units!R", rownames(varcompNDVI_10)), "component"]

V_GE_NDVI_10 <- varcompNDVI_10["germplasmDbId:Location", "component"]

# Calculate heritability
h2_NDVI_10 <- V_A_NDVI_10 / (V_A_NDVI_10 + V_E_NDVI_10 + V_GE_NDVI_10)
print(h2_NDVI_10)
#  0.2295485


# Get variance components
varcompNDVI_10 <- summary(model_NDVI_10)$varcomp
Vg_row <- grep("^germplasmDbId", rownames(varcompNDVI_10), value = TRUE)
Vg_NDVI_10 <- varcompNDVI_10[Vg_row[1], "component"]

# Predict BLUPs
G_hat_NDVI_10 <- predict(model_NDVI_10, 
                     classify = "germplasmDbId", 
                     only = "germplasmDbId", 
                     sed = TRUE,
                     ignore = c("Location", "(Intercept)"))$pvals

# Check for NA std.errors
summary(G_hat_NDVI_10$std.error)

# Remove rows with NA std.error
G_hat_NDVI_10 <- G_hat_NDVI_10[!is.na(G_hat_NDVI_10$std.error), ]

# Calculate reliability
se_NDVI_10 <- G_hat_NDVI_10$std.error
pev_NDVI_10 <- se_NDVI_10^2
rel_NDVI_10 <- 1 - (pev_NDVI_10 / Vg_NDVI_10)

# Output
print(mean(rel_NDVI_10, na.rm = TRUE))
#0.329554

mean_rel_NDVI_10<-mean(rel_NDVI_10, na.rm = TRUE)

summary(rel_NDVI_10)
# Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
# 0.2276  0.2290  0.2292  0.3296  0.4703  0.7474 


```
